Exercises autofill.js's actual window-load activation path

Every other fixture calls runLearningEngine directly, bypassing autofill.js entirely. This one loads the full script chain in manifest order and fires a real 'load' event, so the rewritten afjWatchForApplicationForm / afjCheckForApplicationForm / afjRunFillPass path gets genuine end-to-end coverage — this is now the single entry point every non-Workday site depends on, since the old per-site hardcoded loop was retired.

running…
